name: Gobi Garage Shed Plan - 14x24 Garage Workshop & Storage Building | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: A spacious 336 sq ft structure designed for vehicle storage, workshops, equipment organization, or multi-purpose backyard use.
Clean framing methods, standard lumber sizes, and intuitive building plans make the Gobi shed approachable for both beginners and experienced builders.
Designed to accommodate garage doors or large double-door openings, making it easy to store riding mowers, motorcycles, ATVs, or bulky equipment.
Strategic door and window placement allows for natural daylight, airflow, and convenient daily access.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Gobi Garage Shed - a spacious 14x24 garage-style storage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and clean architectural simplicity. With its strong garage-ready structure, balanced proportions, and practical layout, Gobi delivers a refined exterior with highly functional interior potential. Whether you're planning a backyard garage, dedicated workshop, equipment storage hub, or a multi-purpose hobby space, the 14x24 Gobi Garage...
